data.body: AC amendment: After updating test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh to check root INSTALL.md, verify that the test_install_doc_optional_plugins_section function will pass against the actual root INSTALL.md content (created by story 3028-d955). The test checks for: (1) 'Optional Plugins' section heading, (2) presence of 'feature-dev', 'playwright', 'error-debugging' plugin names. Run 'bash tests/scripts/test-no-unguarded-plugin-refs.sh' and confirm these assertions pass. If root INSTALL.md lacks these sections, coordinate with story 3028-d955 owner to ensure the content migration is complete before committing.
